steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify your FCL100 package contents. The kit includes the main fuel can cage, padlock with keys, and mounting carriage bolts.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify your FCL100 package contents. The kit includes the main fuel can cage, padlock with keys, and mounting carriage bolts.

steps.title: Select Mounting Location
steps.content: For open trailers, position on top rail directly over a post stud. For enclosed trailers, mount to a wall stud (waist high and near door suggested).

es.title: Select Mounting Location
es.content: For open trailers, position on top rail directly over a post stud. For enclosed trailers, mount to a wall stud (waist high and near door suggested).

steps.title: Drill and Secure
steps.content: Mark holes, drill 10mm holes, and secure with carriage bolts and lock nuts. If in enclosed trailer, secure with (4) self-tapping screws.

es.title: Drill and Secure
es.content: Mark holes, drill 10mm holes, and secure with carriage bolts and lock nuts. If in enclosed trailer, secure with (4) self-tapping screws.

steps.title: Base Pad Installation
steps.content: Peel adhesive backing from the rubber cushion pad and press it firmly into the base of the cage to absorb fuel tank vibrations.

es.title: Base Pad Installation
es.content: Peel adhesive backing from the rubber cushion pad and press it firmly into the base of the cage to absorb fuel tank vibrations.

steps.title: SureCan Spout Usage
steps.content: When placing a SureCan in the rack, ensure the rotating spout is aligned over the base cutout. This allows fueling without removing the can.

es.title: SureCan Spout Usage
es.content: When placing a SureCan in the rack, ensure the rotating spout is aligned over the base cutout. This allows fueling without removing the can.
